asset_name: Bronchogen Human and Regulatory Evidence Boundary
status: OPEN — ORGAN-TREATMENT AND APPROVAL CLAIMS NOT ESTABLISHED
source_domain: Independent human trials, product comparability and current jurisdiction-specific regulatory searches
prohibited_use: Organ-treatment, rejuvenation, longevity, dosing or reconstitution guidance
Assignment of a sequence or mechanism from secondary commercial sources
Evidence transfer between different short regulatory peptides
Claims that model-system gene expression proves human efficacy
